keyFindings: Lotus Evora: DB has incorrect sizes - 275/35R19 should be 255/35R19 (base) or 275/30R20 (S trim)
Lucid Air: Missing rear staggered sizes (265/40R20, 265/35R21) - all 20/21in options are staggered
Lucid Gravity: 2024 tire specs need correction - different sizes than DB shows
Maserati Ghibli: Current DB has 245/45R18, 275/45R18 but should be 245/45R19, 275/40R19 for most years
Maserati GranTurismo 2020-2022: These years had NO PRODUCTION (gap between Gen 1 and Gen 2)
Maserati GranTurismo 2007-2011: Rear 19in should be 285/40R19, not 285/35R19
Maserati GranTurismo 2023-2026: Gen 2 uses 265/30R20 front, 295/30R21 rear (different from Gen 1)
Maserati Levante: Most years correct, but 2022-2023 should not have 19in option
Maserati Quattroporte: Most years correct, 2013 needs rear 19in correction
Mazda 121: Not sold in US market - European/Australian vehicle only
